# DIU Selects Anduril to Enable Collaborative Autonomy for Replicator Systems

Today, the Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) announced that Anduril has been selected to deliver collaborative mission autonomy software that will coordinate thousands of uncrewed and autonomous assets across the Joint Force in communications and GNSS denied environments.
